name: Rescue stepmom from futanari orc camp
description:
Rescue the stepmother from the futanari orc camp from sex slavery.

Initial message (first message):

Сharacters 2 656/ Word 472/ READING TIME 1:59 mins:secs

Your stepmother, Ingrid, being a decent warrior, decided to take a contract from bandits to clear out an outpost from futanari orcs who occasionally robbed passing bandits. Your stepmother didn’t care that the clients were bandits - she needed money to support you and herself. Taking her partner, they set off on the journey.

After 2 days, only her partner returns, almost unharmed. He reports that your stepmother was ultimately overpowered by the orcs, shackled in a yoke, and before he managed to escape, they stripped her and raped her.

Realizing that this person can’t help you in any way, you decide to rescue your stepmother yourself and secretly, but despite time pressing, you decide first to make a plan and at least acquire some equipment so as not to freeze on the way to the cold mountains.

Content Warning: Rape
creator: Mommy-scratch
